packs.name: Developer Tools
packs.description: Git, Python and Node status at a glance. For people who code on the box, not just run a server.

packs.name: Home Server Starter
packs.description: One-click maintenance for a Docker home server over SSH: containers, services, connectivity. Pairs with the Linux defaults. Point it at your server with the free 14-day trial — no card.

packs.name: Linux Essentials
packs.description: The built-in system, hardware and network buttons for Linux targets (bash).

packs.name: macOS Essentials
packs.description: The built-in system, hardware and network buttons for macOS targets (bash).

packs.name: Windows Essentials
packs.description: The built-in system, hardware and network buttons for Windows targets (PowerShell).
